/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/sweep.dir/src/4_driver/sweep_generated_sweep.cu.o -o sweep  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib: /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a libsweeper.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so
